mapper.select: SELECT * FROM interview WHERE deleted = 0 AND candidate_id = #{candidateId} ORDER BY scheduled_at DESC
SELECT * FROM interview WHERE deleted = 0 AND job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY scheduled_at DESC
SELECT * FROM interview WHERE deleted = 0 AND interviewer_id = #{interviewerId} ORDER BY scheduled_at DESC
SELECT * FROM interview WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY scheduled_at DESC
SELECT * FROM interview WHERE deleted = 0 AND scheduled_at <= #{before} AND status = 1 ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
